summary.en: AI platform that turns business activity data into go-to-market insights for enterprises.
summary.zh: 運用 AI 將商業活動數據轉化為市場開拓洞察的企業平台。

highlight.en: Automatically ingests go-to-market data from sources like email to give sellers, marketers, and ops leaders actionable insights for revenue growth.
highlight.zh: 自動從電子郵件等來源擷取市場開拓數據,為業務、行銷與營運主管提供可付諸行動的營收成長洞察。

summary.en: India's largest vehicle-sharing platform for renting cars and bikes.
summary.zh: 印度最大的車輛共享平台,提供汽車與機車租賃服務。

highlight.en: A car and bike sharing service aiming for a future where owning a vehicle becomes unnecessary, available via Android and iOS apps.
highlight.zh: 汽車與機車共享服務,願景是邁向不再需要擁有車輛的未來,透過 Android 與 iOS 應用程式提供。

summary.en: Customer support delivered as a service to clear ticket backlogs.
summary.zh: 以服務形式提供客戶支援,協助清空工單積壓。

highlight.en: Handles customer support so in-house teams can stop clearing ticket backlogs and focus on higher-level tasks.
highlight.zh: 代為處理客戶支援,讓內部團隊不再忙於清理工單積壓,得以專注於更高層次的任務。

summary.en: An online marketplace to search, compare, and enroll in college programs in Brazil.
summary.zh: 在巴西搜尋、比較並報名大學課程的線上市集。

highlight.en: Connects students to over 1,200 partner colleges in Brazil, helping them compare programs and save money on tuition.
highlight.zh: 串連巴西超過 1,200 所合作大學,協助學生比較課程並節省學費。

summary.en: Modern transportation management ERP software for trucking companies.
summary.zh: 為貨運公司打造的現代化運輸管理 ERP 軟體。

highlight.en: Lets transportation companies move and process freight online instead of relying on phone calls and email.
highlight.zh: 讓運輸公司透過線上處理貨運,取代仰賴電話與電子郵件的傳統作業方式。

summary.en: Booking and payment platform to grow barbershops and maximize profitability.
summary.zh: 協助理髮店成長並提升獲利的預約與付款平台。

highlight.en: A one-stop barbershop management platform with bookings, payments, POS, inventory, and payroll, plus a discovery tool for customers to find barbers.
highlight.zh: 一站式理髮店管理平台,整合預約、付款、POS、庫存與薪資,並提供讓顧客尋找理髮師的探索工具。

summary.en: On-demand service making car ownership and management frictionless.
summary.zh: 讓擁車與養車變得無縫順暢的隨需服務。

highlight.en: Aims to modernize vehicle fueling and servicing infrastructure, targeting the large share of ownership cost driven by fuel and maintenance.
highlight.zh: 致力於革新車輛加油與保養基礎設施,瞄準燃油與保養所佔的高昂擁車成本。

summary.en: Carbon MRV SaaS for energy and hard-to-abate sectors.
summary.zh: 為能源與難減排產業打造的碳排放 MRV SaaS。

highlight.en: Turns disconnected energy data into actionable financial and environmental pathways, used by over 50 leading North American energy companies.
highlight.zh: 將零散的能源數據轉化為可行的財務與環境路徑,獲北美 50 多家領先能源公司採用。

summary.en: A software platform for planning and remembering all of life's events.
summary.zh: 用於規劃並記錄人生各種重要時刻的軟體平台。

highlight.en: Helps people plan and celebrate life's events—big or small—with a mission to help the world celebrate better together.
highlight.zh: 協助人們規劃並慶祝大小人生時刻,使命是讓世界更好地共同慶祝。

summary.en: Credit infrastructure company enabling lending through alternative credit data.
summary.zh: 運用替代信用數據協助放貸的信用基礎設施公司。

highlight.en: A Consumer Reporting Agency turning fragmented financial data into compliant risk insights via products like Cash Atlas, Income Navigator, and Credit Passport.
highlight.zh: 作為消費者徵信機構,透過 Cash Atlas、Income Navigator 與 Credit Passport 等產品,將零散財務數據轉化為合規的風險洞察。

summary.en: Marketplace that makes booking services as easy as buying products online.
summary.zh: 讓預訂服務像線上購物一樣簡單的市集。

highlight.en: Offers over 1,000 services from cleaning to remodeling, having fulfilled more than $1.5 billion in transactions across 1.5 million households.
highlight.zh: 提供從清潔到裝修等逾 1,000 種服務,已為 150 萬個家庭完成超過 15 億美元的交易。

summary.en: eCommerce platform powering the animal health supply chain for veterinarians.
summary.zh: 為獸醫驅動動物健康供應鏈的電商平台。

highlight.en: Serves a community of over 18,000 veterinary hospitals and powers purchasing for half of America's general practices as of 2022.
highlight.zh: 服務超過 18,000 家獸醫院的社群,截至 2022 年為全美一半的一般診所提供採購支援。

summary.en: Software to manage the solar PV lifecycle, built by an MIT-born startup.
summary.zh: 由 MIT 起家的新創打造,用於管理太陽能光電生命週期的軟體。

highlight.en: Deployed across 45 countries and 200+ million solar panels, enabling the solar industry to scale operations and maintenance.
highlight.zh: 部署於 45 個國家、逾 2 億片太陽能板,協助太陽能產業擴大營運與維護規模。

summary.en: SaaS platform that automates grant discovery and management for nonprofits.
summary.zh: 為非營利組織自動化補助金探索與管理的 SaaS 平台。

highlight.en: Helps social enterprises discover, track, and win grant funding, reporting over 100% year-over-year growth while cash flow positive.
highlight.zh: 協助社會企業探索、追蹤並贏得補助金,在維持正現金流的同時年增率超過 100%。

summary.en: Building the mobile OS for higher education to boost student engagement.
summary.zh: 為高等教育打造行動作業系統,提升學生參與度。

highlight.en: Used by over 350 institutions, its branded campus app unifies LMS, events, clubs, and athletics so administrators can track and lift student engagement.
highlight.zh: 獲超過 350 所機構採用,其品牌化校園應用整合 LMS、活動、社團與體育,讓管理者追蹤並提升學生參與度。

summary.en: Cash transfer programs that encourage Nigerian mothers to immunize infants.
summary.zh: 鼓勵奈及利亞母親為嬰兒接種疫苗的現金轉移計畫。

highlight.en: Implements cash transfers that save lives by motivating Nigerian mothers to immunize their infants against deadly diseases.
highlight.zh: 透過現金轉移激勵奈及利亞母親為嬰兒接種疫苗以對抗致命疾病,藉此拯救生命。

summary.en: A concierge service arranging rides, meals, meds, and home help for seniors.
summary.zh: 為長者安排乘車、餐食、藥物與居家協助的禮賓服務。

highlight.en: A virtual retirement community accessible by regular phone call, with vetted providers and over 99% monitored reliability so seniors can live at home longer.
highlight.zh: 可透過一般電話使用的虛擬退休社群,服務商皆經審查並監控逾 99% 可靠度,讓長者得以更久居家生活。

summary.en: A community-based marketplace to review, discover, and shop hardware products.
summary.zh: 以社群為基礎、評論探索並選購硬體產品的市集。

highlight.en: Combines community reviews with a marketplace to help people discover and buy global hardware products.
highlight.zh: 結合社群評論與市集,協助人們探索並購買全球硬體產品。

summary.en: Makes selling event tickets easy and secure for organizers.
summary.zh: 讓主辦方輕鬆且安全地銷售活動門票。

highlight.en: Controls both primary and secondary ticket markets to stop fraud and scalping, giving organizers control over resale and fair revenue sharing.
highlight.zh: 同時掌控門票一級與二級市場以杜絕詐騙與黃牛,讓主辦方掌握轉售並公平分潤。

summary.en: An investment firm specializing in alternative investments with legal risk.
summary.zh: 專注於涉及法律風險之另類投資的投資公司。

highlight.en: Focuses on alternative investments involving legal and regulatory risk.
highlight.zh: 專注於涉及法律與監管風險的另類投資。

summary.en: Lets developers build native iOS, Android, and web apps using JavaScript.
summary.zh: 讓開發者用 JavaScript 打造原生 iOS、Android 與網頁應用。

highlight.en: Pairs JavaScript and React Native development with Expo Application Services (EAS) to speed teams to the app stores and beyond.
highlight.zh: 結合 JavaScript 與 React Native 開發,並透過 Expo Application Services（EAS）加速團隊上架應用商店並持續成長。

summary.en: Provides augmented reality technologies and content to app developers.
summary.zh: 為應用開發者提供擴增實境技術與內容。

highlight.en: A Palo Alto media-tech startup supplying AR technology and content to smartphone makers, telcos, and application developers.
highlight.zh: 位於帕羅奧圖的媒體科技新創,向手機製造商、電信商與應用開發者提供 AR 技術與內容。

summary.en: Robotic production capacity offered as a service to pharma manufacturers.
summary.zh: 以服務形式為製藥商提供機器人產能。

highlight.en: Builds cloud-controlled modular robots that manufacture individualized drugs, deployed in pharma customers' facilities as production-as-a-service.
highlight.zh: 打造雲端控制的模組化機器人以生產個人化藥物,部署於製藥客戶廠房,提供生產即服務。

summary.en: A smart-market U.S. equities trading venue for institutional investors.
summary.zh: 為機構投資人打造的智慧市場美股交易場所。

highlight.en: A U.S. equities ATS designed from the ground up to close the gap between how venues match orders and how traders need to execute.
highlight.zh: 從底層重新設計的美股 ATS,旨在彌合交易場所撮合訂單方式與交易者實際執行需求之間的落差。

summary.en: A company revolutionizing the way we test for disease.
summary.zh: 致力於革新疾病檢測方式的公司。

highlight.en: Formerly ExVivo Labs, focused on transforming how disease testing is done.
highlight.zh: 前身為 ExVivo Labs,專注於改變疾病檢測的進行方式。

summary.en: A no-code platform for building and deploying vision AI.
summary.zh: 用於建構並部署視覺 AI 的無程式碼平台。

highlight.en: Lets users of all technical levels label data, train models, and power real-time decisions across the entire vision-AI lifecycle without code.
highlight.zh: 讓各種技術程度的使用者無需寫程式即可標註數據、訓練模型,並在整個視覺 AI 生命週期中驅動即時決策。

summary.en: Top-selling sustainable period care brand for a more comfortable period.
summary.zh: 暢銷的永續經期照護品牌,帶來更舒適的生理期。

highlight.en: Sole maker of patented products like Flex Disc and FlexCup, sold in over 30,000 U.S. retail doors including Walmart, Target, CVS, and Walgreens.
highlight.zh: 自製 Flex Disc、FlexCup 等專利產品,於美國逾 30,000 家零售門市販售,含 Walmart、Target、CVS 與 Walgreens。

summary.en: Bringing third-generation nanopore sequencing into clinical healthcare.
summary.zh: 將第三代奈米孔定序帶入臨床醫療。

highlight.en: A precision medicine company enabling reliable nanopore sequencing in under a minute, initially targeting infectious disease and sepsis.
highlight.zh: 一家精準醫療公司,可在一分鐘內完成可靠的奈米孔定序,初期鎖定傳染病與敗血症。

summary.en: International nonprofit empowering diverse women to excel in tech careers.
summary.zh: 賦能多元女性在科技職涯卓越發展的國際非營利組織。

highlight.en: Has run more than 15,000 free events worldwide, reaching a membership of over 320,000 across 147 countries.
highlight.zh: 已在全球舉辦逾 15,000 場免費活動,會員人數超過 32 萬,遍及 147 個國家。

summary.en: Just-in-time training and communication app for frontline healthcare teams.
summary.zh: 為前線醫療團隊提供即時培訓與溝通的應用程式。

highlight.en: A UCSF-backed B2B SaaS acting as a "playbook in your pocket," reporting 20x ROI and a 75% decrease in medical errors.
highlight.zh: 由 UCSF 支持的 B2B SaaS,如同「口袋中的手冊」,據稱帶來 20 倍投資報酬與醫療錯誤減少 75%。

summary.en: Online tool that guides applicants through U.S. citizenship and immigration.
summary.zh: 引導申請者辦理美國公民與移民手續的線上工具。

highlight.en: Makes applying for U.S. citizenship as simple as an online job application—20 questions in 20 minutes can save thousands in lawyer fees.
highlight.zh: 讓申請美國公民如線上求職般簡單——20 分鐘回答 20 個問題,可省下數千美元律師費。

summary.en: An AI sales assistant that qualifies leads via two-way email conversation.
summary.zh: 透過雙向電子郵件對話篩選潛在客戶的 AI 業務助理。

highlight.en: Automates lead qualification, CRM data entry, enrichment, and assignment so sales teams receive only qualified leads and meetings.
highlight.zh: 自動化潛在客戶篩選、CRM 資料輸入、資料豐富化與分派,讓業務團隊只收到已篩選的合格客戶與會議。

summary.en: Event marketing CRM built for demand gen and field marketing teams.
summary.zh: 為需求開發與實地行銷團隊打造的活動行銷 CRM。

highlight.en: Helps sales and marketing teams plan and run events everywhere and every way their customers gather.
highlight.zh: 協助業務與行銷團隊在客戶聚集的各種場合與方式中規劃並執行活動。

summary.en: Building NLP for local languages in emerging markets.
summary.zh: 為新興市場的本地語言建構自然語言處理技術。

highlight.en: Develops an advanced language AI platform for enterprises, focused on voice interaction in underserved emerging markets.
highlight.zh: 為企業開發先進的語言 AI 平台,專注於服務不足之新興市場的語音互動。

summary.en: Financial wellness company offering workplace coaching for the middle class.
summary.zh: 為中產階級提供職場理財輔導的財務健康公司。

highlight.en: Provides workplace financial wellness programs built around 1-on-1 financial coaching to benefit both employers and employees.
highlight.zh: 提供以一對一理財輔導為核心的職場財務健康計畫,讓雇主與員工雙方受益。

summary.en: A sustainable clothing resale app for women to buy and sell from their phones.
summary.zh: 讓女性用手機買賣的永續服飾轉售應用程式。

highlight.en: Holds no inventory, shipping directly seller to buyer with a 20% fee, and targets Gen Z women aged 15-30 underserved by Poshmark and eBay.
highlight.zh: 不持有庫存,由賣家直接出貨給買家並收取 20% 費用,鎖定 Poshmark 與 eBay 服務不足的 15 至 30 歲 Z 世代女性。

summary.en: Infrastructure helping retailers and carriers sell devices on subscription.
summary.zh: 協助零售商與電信商以訂閱方式銷售裝置的基礎設施。

highlight.en: Handles lender integrations and residual value management so partners like Apple, MediaMarkt, and Vodafone can launch device subscriptions in a $541B market.
highlight.zh: 處理放貸方整合與殘值管理,讓 Apple、MediaMarkt 與 Vodafone 等夥伴在 5,410 億美元市場推出裝置訂閱。

summary.en: Incubates and builds alternative-currency marketplaces.
summary.zh: 孵化並打造另類貨幣市集。

highlight.en: Focuses on creating marketplaces built around alternative currencies.
highlight.zh: 專注於打造圍繞另類貨幣的市集。

summary.en: Constituent record and service-request software for government teams.
summary.zh: 為政府團隊打造的民眾紀錄與服務請求管理軟體。

highlight.en: Its Romulus platform centralizes constituent communications and service requests, purpose-built for government rather than repurposed private-sector tools.
highlight.zh: 其民眾服務平台 Romulus 集中管理溝通並整理服務請求,專為政府而非沿用私部門工具打造。

summary.en: A full personal computer that runs from the cloud via a client app.
summary.zh: 透過用戶端應用,從雲端運行的完整個人電腦。

highlight.en: Delivers a complete cloud computer so users can run any app anywhere on any device without hardware upgrades or slow performance.
highlight.zh: 提供完整的雲端電腦,讓使用者在任何裝置上隨處運行任何應用,免去硬體升級與效能緩慢的困擾。

summary.en: An adaptive learning and assessment platform for students and educators.
summary.zh: 為學生與教育者打造的適性學習與評量平台。

highlight.en: Serves reading at each student's level and pairs it with science assessment tool InnerOrbit, having reached over 650,000 students.
highlight.zh: 依各學生程度提供閱讀內容,並搭配科學評量工具 InnerOrbit,已服務超過 65 萬名學生。

summary.en: A community and marketplace to browse and shop celebrity and influencer looks.
summary.zh: 瀏覽並選購名人與網紅造型的社群與市集。

highlight.en: Lets users browse the style of celebrities and influencers and shop their looks, aiming to be the authority on global style and culture.
highlight.zh: 讓使用者瀏覽名人與網紅的風格並選購其造型,志在成為全球風格與文化的權威來源。

summary.en: On-demand tech support concierge for homes and small businesses.
summary.zh: 為居家與小型企業提供隨需技術支援的禮賓服務。

highlight.en: Offers fast-booking onsite or virtual tech support in as little as two hours, with transparent pricing and vetted technicians.
highlight.zh: 提供最快兩小時內的到府或遠端技術支援,定價透明且技師皆經審查。

summary.en: Building self-driving robots for last-mile delivery of food and packages.
summary.zh: 打造用於最後一哩配送食物與包裹的自駕機器人。

highlight.en: Founded by two MIT PhDs in computer vision and robotics, it ran sidewalk delivery pilots with major US partners in the Bay Area from 2016.
highlight.zh: 由兩位電腦視覺與機器人領域的 MIT 博士創立,自 2016 年起與美國大型夥伴在灣區進行人行道配送試營運。

summary.en: A short looped-video service, like YouTube for video loops.
summary.zh: 短迴圈影片服務,猶如影片迴圈版的 YouTube。

highlight.en: Lets users create easily shareable looped videos with soundtracks, reaching more than 51 million unique visitors per month.
highlight.zh: 讓使用者輕鬆製作可配樂、易於分享的迴圈影片,每月吸引超過 5,100 萬名不重複訪客。

summary.en: A last-mile logistics platform for delivery and field service teams.
summary.zh: 為配送與實地服務團隊打造的最後一哩物流平台。

highlight.en: Powers real-time collaboration across distributed service teams in the $30B field service market, aiming to modernize work for over 400M mobile-service workers.
highlight.zh: 為 300 億美元的實地服務市場中分散的服務團隊驅動即時協作,目標革新逾 4 億名行動服務工作者的作業方式。

summary.en: An autonomous truck startup building driverless trucks.
summary.zh: 打造無人駕駛卡車的自駕卡車新創。

highlight.en: Aims to make roads safer with autonomous trucks while giving truck drivers jobs that bring them home to their families.
highlight.zh: 以自駕卡車提升道路安全,同時提供讓卡車司機能回家陪伴家人的工作。

summary.en: Helps aspiring creators go viral and monetize their content.
summary.zh: 協助有志創作者爆紅並將內容變現。

highlight.en: Helps aspiring creators go viral and build businesses by monetizing their content.
highlight.zh: 協助有志創作者爆紅,並透過內容變現建立事業。

summary.en: A network for decentralized threshold cryptography and end-to-end encryption.
summary.zh: 用於去中心化門檻密碼學與端對端加密的網路。

highlight.en: A founding team of the Threshold Network whose flagship TACo product runs on over 120 nodes with around $80M of economic security since its Jan 2024 launch.
highlight.zh: Threshold Network 的創始團隊之一,旗艦產品 TACo 運行於逾 120 個節點、約 8,000 萬美元經濟安全保障,自 2024 年 1 月主網上線即去中心化。

summary.en: An AI-powered grocery delivery service promising delivery in under 60 minutes.
summary.zh: AI 驅動的雜貨配送服務,承諾 60 分鐘內送達。

highlight.en: An artificial-intelligence-powered farm-to-doorstep grocery delivery startup.
highlight.zh: 以人工智慧驅動、從農場直送到府的雜貨配送新創。

summary.en: At-home testing and treatment in minutes for chronic and acute disease.
summary.zh: 在家數分鐘內完成慢性與急性疾病檢測與治療。

highlight.en: Combines proprietary glow-in-the-dark nanochemistry with connected hardware and mobile apps for testing across infectious, metabolic, and chronic conditions.
highlight.zh: 結合自有的夜光奈米化學技術與連網硬體及行動應用,用於傳染、代謝與慢性病症的檢測。

summary.en: A collaborative web and mobile construction management platform.
summary.zh: 協作式網頁與行動營建管理平台。

highlight.en: Digitally integrates construction processes, compliance, and checklists, alerting teams to delays and technical risks while archiving comms for traceability.
highlight.zh: 數位化整合營建流程、合規與檢查清單,在出現延誤或技術風險時提醒團隊,並封存溝通紀錄以利追溯。

summary.en: Payment plans for airline tickets—pay a fraction upfront, the rest over time.
summary.zh: 機票分期付款——先付一小部分,其餘分期繳清。

highlight.en: Lets travelers secure tickets with an upfront deposit and pay the remaining balance in recurring installments before departure.
highlight.zh: 讓旅客先付訂金保留機票,並在出發前以分期方式繳清餘額。

summary.en: Booking platform for guaranteed connecting rooms and luxury hotel suites.
summary.zh: 預訂保證相連客房與豪華飯店套房的平台。

highlight.en: The first online platform dedicated solely to luxury hotel suites, serving group travelers and families seeking to stay together.
highlight.zh: 首個專營豪華飯店套房的線上平台,服務希望共同入住的團體旅客與家庭。

summary.en: AI platform helping schools catch student behavior problems before they start.
summary.zh: 協助學校在問題發生前察覺學生行為徵兆的 AI 平台。

highlight.en: Analyzes behavioral and social-emotional data to flag early needs, letting schools support 8x as many students 12x earlier without adding staff.
highlight.zh: 分析行為與社會情緒數據以提早標示需求,讓學校在不增聘人力下支援多 8 倍學生、提前 12 倍介入。

summary.en: Wireless screen-sharing for enterprise conference rooms.
summary.zh: 為企業會議室提供的無線螢幕分享。

highlight.en: Lets users wirelessly project content from any tablet or laptop to existing projectors or TVs with a single click.
highlight.zh: 讓使用者一鍵將任何平板或筆電的內容無線投影到現有投影機或電視。

summary.en: An API that estimates utility costs for over 100 million homes.
summary.zh: 估算逾 1 億戶家庭水電費的 API。

highlight.en: Helps real estate sites, building suppliers, solar companies, and lenders target, engage, and convert more customers with utility-cost estimates.
highlight.zh: 以水電費估算協助房地產網站、建材供應商、太陽能公司與放貸方鎖定、互動並轉化更多客戶。

summary.en: Computer science coding courses for tweens and teens.
summary.zh: 為青少年打造的電腦科學程式設計課程。

highlight.en: Offers over 300 self-guided tutorials where teens build video filters, simulations, and AR projects, founded with a focus on girls and underrepresented groups.
highlight.zh: 提供逾 300 個自學教程,讓青少年打造影片濾鏡、模擬與 AR 專案,創立時特別關注女孩與弱勢學生。

summary.en: Premium immersive cinematic VR entertainment for captive audiences.
summary.zh: 為受限環境觀眾打造的優質沉浸式劇院級 VR 娛樂。

highlight.en: Started as inflight VR entertainment and expanded to patients, bundling content licensing, software, headset hardware, and operations as a subscription.
highlight.zh: 從機上 VR 娛樂起家並擴展至病患,將內容授權、軟體、頭戴裝置硬體與營運整合為訂閱服務。

summary.en: Applies chemical control over cell behavior to optimize biomanufacturing.
summary.zh: 以化學方式控制細胞行為,優化生物製造。

highlight.en: Uses chemical control of cell behavior to optimize the biomanufacturing of high-value biopharmaceutical products.
highlight.zh: 運用對細胞行為的化學控制,優化高價值生物製藥產品的生物製造。

summary.en: A machine learning algorithm that performs better on small data sets.
summary.zh: 在小型數據集上表現更佳的機器學習演算法。

highlight.en: Uses neural networks and adaptive input to generate better data, helping e-commerce sites learn what each buyer wants from the first visit.
highlight.zh: 運用神經網路與適性輸入產生更優質的數據,協助電商網站從首次造訪起便了解每位買家的需求。

summary.en: A hardware device that protects construction workers from health risks.
summary.zh: 保護營建工人免受健康風險的硬體裝置。

highlight.en: Combines a rugged site-deployed connected device with cloud infrastructure and dashboards to automate health and safety risk mitigation and compliance.
highlight.zh: 結合工地部署的堅固連網裝置、雲端基礎設施與儀表板,自動化健康安全風險緩解與法規遵循。

summary.en: Lets grocery shoppers scan items and check out on their phones.
summary.zh: 讓雜貨顧客用手機掃描商品並結帳。

highlight.en: Aims for a no-line, no-wait retail checkout where shoppers simply scan, pay, and go.
highlight.zh: 志在打造無排隊、無等待的零售結帳體驗,讓顧客掃描、付款即走。

summary.en: Gather and share medical records online from any doctor or hospital.
summary.zh: 線上向任何醫師或醫院蒐集並分享病歷。

highlight.en: Helps people gather and share medical records online, backed by Y Combinator, General Catalyst, and Khosla Ventures.
highlight.zh: 協助人們線上蒐集與分享病歷,獲 Y Combinator、General Catalyst 與 Khosla Ventures 支持。

summary.en: Automatically downloads all your business PDF bills each month for accounting.
summary.zh: 每月自動下載企業所有 PDF 帳單供記帳使用。

highlight.en: A one-click tool that automatically downloads online PDF bills from services like Uber, AWS, and Google Ads, freeing SMBs from tedious manual accounting.
highlight.zh: 一鍵自動下載 Uber、AWS、Google Ads 等服務的線上 PDF 帳單供會計使用,讓中小企業擺脫繁瑣的人工作業。

summary.en: Reducing post-run paperwork to improve ambulance operations.
summary.zh: 減少出勤後文書作業以提升救護車營運效率。

highlight.en: Aims to cut the paperwork after each ambulance run and create a channel to securely send patient information to hospitals in a timely manner.
highlight.zh: 致力於減少每趟救護車出勤後的文書作業,並建立及時安全地將病患資訊傳送至醫院的管道。

summary.en: A voice-controlled speaker and social platform for streaming web music.
summary.zh: 用於串流網路音樂的聲控喇叭與社交平台。

highlight.en: A social music platform that links places where people post music, like YouTube and SoundCloud, with where they share it, like Facebook and Twitter.
highlight.zh: 連結 YouTube、SoundCloud 等發布音樂之處,與 Facebook、Twitter 等分享音樂之處的社交音樂平台。

summary.en: A mobile-first makeup retailer and social commerce app.
summary.zh: 以行動為先的彩妝零售與社交電商應用。

highlight.en: A mobile-first makeup retailer positioned as a top social commerce app in the United States.
highlight.zh: 以行動為先的彩妝零售商,定位為美國頂尖的社交電商應用之一。

summary.en: Bringing AI to the accounting industry, starting with automated bookkeeping.
summary.zh: 將 AI 帶入會計產業,從自動化記帳起步。

highlight.en: Combines proprietary machine learning models with API integrations to deliver a low-touch automated bookkeeping service for SaaS companies.
highlight.zh: 結合自有機器學習模型與 API 整合,為 SaaS 公司提供低人工介入的自動化記帳服務。

summary.en: Automated deployments to help software teams ship code.
summary.zh: 協助軟體團隊發布程式碼的自動化部署。

highlight.en: Makes the most chaotic part of software creation safe and easy, helping engineering teams be more productive and collaborative when shipping.
highlight.zh: 讓軟體開發中最混亂的環節變得安全易用,協助工程團隊在發布時更具生產力與協作性。

summary.en: A selective web gateway that stops malware from exfiltrating data.
summary.zh: 阻止惡意軟體外洩資料的選擇性網路閘道。

highlight.en: A proxy platform that detects and prevents malware exfiltration, effectively rendering the malware useless.
highlight.zh: 偵測並阻止惡意軟體資料外洩的代理平台,實質上讓惡意軟體失去作用。

summary.en: An artisan food marketplace for restaurants and specialty food stores.
summary.zh: 為餐廳與特色食品店打造的手工食品市集。

highlight.en: Connects restaurants and specialty food stores with artisan food producers through an online marketplace.
highlight.zh: 透過線上市集連結餐廳與特色食品店和手工食品生產者。

summary.en: A micropayment wallet helping publishers recover revenue lost to ad blockers.
summary.zh: 協助出版商收回因廣告攔截而流失營收的微支付錢包。

highlight.en: A digital wallet letting users buy articles, videos, and posts via micropayments across sites, giving publishers a revenue channel beyond ads and subscriptions.
highlight.zh: 讓使用者跨網站以微支付購買文章、影片與貼文的數位錢包,為出版商提供廣告與訂閱以外的營收管道。

summary.en: A personal location-based journal that catalogs experiences and interactions.
summary.zh: 以位置為基礎、記錄體驗與互動的個人日誌。

highlight.en: Automatically preserves a record of places, paths, and activities, letting users add friends and browse photos.
highlight.zh: 自動保存地點、路徑與活動的紀錄,讓使用者新增好友並瀏覽照片。

summary.en: Helps Twitch and eSports streamers engage and monetize their fan base.
summary.zh: 協助 Twitch 與電競實況主吸引並變現粉絲群。

highlight.en: Formerly Revlo, it lets streamers reward loyal fans with recognition, merchandise, and interaction, driving repeat viewership and paid subscriptions.
highlight.zh: 前身為 Revlo,讓實況主以表彰、商品與互動獎勵忠實粉絲,提升回訪觀看與付費訂閱。

summary.en: An AI armband that passively tracks and helps manage mental health.
summary.zh: 被動追蹤並協助管理心理健康的 AI 臂帶。

highlight.en: A wearable armband that automatically detects rising anxiety and recommends easy tweaks to reduce stress.
highlight.zh: 自動偵測焦慮升高並推薦簡單調整以減壓的穿戴式臂帶。

summary.en: An API for invoice financing.
summary.zh: 用於發票融資的 API。

highlight.en: Provides an API for invoice financing under the Fellow brand.
highlight.zh: 以 Fellow 品牌提供發票融資的 API。

summary.en: Nanoparticle tracers for reservoir characterization in hydraulic fracturing.
summary.zh: 用於水力壓裂中油藏特性分析的奈米粒子示蹤劑。

highlight.en: Develops nanoparticle fluorescent tracers for reservoir characterization in geothermal and oilfield applications.
highlight.zh: 開發用於地熱與油田應用中油藏特性分析的奈米粒子螢光示蹤劑。

summary.en: An email productivity platform for business sales communication.
summary.zh: 用於企業業務溝通的電子郵件生產力平台。

highlight.en: Combines email tracking, Salesforce sync, and calendar scheduling to help sales teams boost conversion and give executives visibility into activity.
highlight.zh: 整合郵件追蹤、Salesforce 同步與行事曆排程,協助業務團隊提升轉換率並讓主管掌握活動狀況。

summary.en: A content discovery platform building digital media brands for Africa.
summary.zh: 為非洲打造數位媒體品牌的內容探索平台。

highlight.en: Creates next-generation digital media brands for African audiences, including properties such as OMGVoice and Bitnode.
highlight.zh: 為非洲受眾打造新一代數位媒體品牌,旗下包含 OMGVoice 與 Bitnode 等媒體資產。

summary.en: Powerful microengines that extend flight times for UAVs.
summary.zh: 延長無人機飛行時間的強力微型引擎。

highlight.en: Builds solid-state microengines running on light fuel that reach eight times the specific energy of lithium polymer batteries at a third of the cost.
highlight.zh: 開發以輕質燃料運行的固態熱電光伏微型引擎,比能量達鋰聚合物電池的八倍,成本僅三分之一。

summary.en: The best tool for prototyping server-side JavaScript.
summary.zh: 原型開發伺服器端 JavaScript 的最佳工具。

highlight.en: Provides sandboxed JavaScript notebooks where developers can switch Node versions, use any npm module instantly, and visualize results with one click.
highlight.zh: 提供沙箱化的 JavaScript 筆記本,讓開發者切換 Node 版本、即時使用任何 npm 模組,並一鍵視覺化結果。

summary.en: White-label voice search for e-commerce apps.
summary.zh: 為電商應用打造的白標語音搜尋。

highlight.en: Lets e-commerce apps add conversational voice search that understands context and unindexed concepts, deployable in minutes with custom speech models.
highlight.zh: 讓電商應用加入能理解上下文與未建索引概念的對話式語音搜尋,可在數分鐘內以客製語音模型部署。

summary.en: Manufactures electric propulsion systems for space satellites.
summary.zh: 製造太空衛星電力推進系統。

highlight.en: Builds electric propulsion systems for satellites, aiming to enable new possibilities in space while drastically reducing cost and waste.
highlight.zh: 打造衛星電力推進系統,目標在大幅降低成本與浪費的同時開創太空新可能。

summary.en: A nonprofit tech platform helping Americans register and vote.
summary.zh: 協助美國人登記並投票的非營利科技平台。

highlight.en: Provides online tools that make it easier for U.S. citizens to register and participate in elections.
highlight.zh: 提供線上工具,讓美國公民更輕鬆地完成選民登記並參與選舉。

summary.en: AI software enabling safe autonomous drone operations globally.
summary.zh: 讓全球無人機安全自主運作的 AI 軟體。

highlight.en: Enables beyond-line-of-sight drone flight through intelligent onboard collision avoidance, built by a team drawn from NASA, Boeing, and computer vision PhDs.
highlight.zh: 透過機載智慧避撞實現超視距無人機飛行,團隊成員來自 NASA、波音及電腦視覺博士。

summary.en: Connects families with trusted local professionals for in-home senior care.
summary.zh: 為居家長者照護連結值得信賴的在地專業人員。

highlight.en: Helps families get at-home care for parents from trusted professionals in their own neighbourhood.
highlight.zh: 協助家庭從鄰里中值得信賴的專業人員獲得父母的居家照護。

summary.en: A system that detects unwanted drones and drives them away.
summary.zh: 偵測並驅離不速無人機的系統。

highlight.en: Developed by Israel Defense Forces experts and serving over 25 countries, it detects, blocks, and tracks down unauthorized drones and operators.
highlight.zh: 由以色列國防軍專家開發、服務逾 25 國,可偵測、攔阻並追查未經授權的無人機與操作者。

summary.en: A digital mortgage company that gathers borrower documents automatically.
summary.zh: 自動蒐集借款人文件的數位房貸公司。

highlight.en: Instantly gathers original borrower documents by linking to financial accounts, raising loan team productivity by 25%+ and keeping portfolios liquid for resale.
highlight.zh: 透過連結金融帳戶即時蒐集借款人原始文件,提升貸款團隊生產力逾 25%,並讓投資組合在二級市場保持流動性。

summary.en: One of the largest co-living brands, which exited to Common in 2021.
summary.zh: 最大的共居品牌之一,於 2021 年被 Common 收購退出。

highlight.en: Grew into one of the largest co-living brands before its 2021 exit to Common.
highlight.zh: 成長為最大的共居品牌之一,並於 2021 年被 Common 收購退出。
